description:
'''Contemporary Christian music''' ('''CCM'''), also known as '''Christian pop''', and occasionally '''inspirational music''', is a genre of modern [[popular music]], and an aspect of [[Christian media]], which is lyrically focused on matters related to the [[Christianity|Christian faith]] and stylistically rooted in [[Christian music]].{{refn|<ref name="Payne 2024a"/><ref name="McGinnis 2024"/><ref name="Moberg 2023"/><ref name="Thornton 2020"/>}} Originating in the [[United States]],{{refn|<ref name="Payne 2024a"/><ref name="Moberg 2023"/><ref name="Thornton 2020"/>}} it was formed by those affected by the 1960s [[Jesus movement]] [[Christian revival|revival]] who began to express themselves in other styles of popular music, beyond the [[church music]] of [[Christian hymn|hymns]], [[Gospel music|Gospel]], [[Traditional black gospel]], and [[Southern gospel]] music that was prevalent in the church at the time. Initially referred to as "[[Jesus music]]",{{refn|<ref name="Payne 2024b"/><ref name="ForbesMahan2017"/>}} today, the term is typically used to refer to [[Pop music|pop]], but also includes [[Christian rock]], [[southern rock]], [[Christian alternative rock|alternative rock]], [[Christian hip-hop|hip-hop]], [[Christian metal|metal]], [[Contemporary worship music|contemporary worship]], [[Christian punk|punk]], [[Christian hardcore|hardcore punk]], [[Latin Christian music|Latin]], [[Christian electronic dance music|electronic dance music]], [[Urban contemporary gospel|R&B-influenced gospel]], and [[Christian country music|country]] styles.

After its development in the [[United States]],{{refn|<ref name="Payne 2024a"/><ref name="Moberg 2023"/><ref name="Thornton 2020"/>}} contemporary Christian music has since become a globally recognized style of [[Religious music|faith-based]] popular music.{{refn|<ref name="McGinnis 2024">{{cite magazine |author-last=McGinnis |author-first=Kelsey K. |date=22 March 2024 |title=From Passion to the Pews, Major Conferences Inspire Local Worship |url=https://www.christianitytoday.com/2024/03/worship-conference-passion-kristian-stanfill-church-leaders/ |url-status=live |editor-last=Olasky |editor-first=Marvin |editor-link=Marvin Olasky |magazine=[[Christianity Today]] |location=[[Carol Stream, Illinois]] |publisher=Christianity Today International |issn=0009-5753 |oclc=1554505 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20241203044900/https://www.christianitytoday.com/2024/03/worship-conference-passion-kristian-stanfill-church-leaders/ |archive-date=3 December 2024 |access-date=9 May 2026}}</ref><ref name="Moberg 2023">{{cite book |author-last=Moberg |author-first=Marcus |year=2023 |chapter=End-Time Lyrics and Music in Contemporary Christian “ApokRock” |editor1-last=DiTommaso |editor1-first=Lorenzo |editor2-last=McAllister |editor2-first=Colin |title=Music in the Apocalyptic Mode |location=[[Leiden]] and [[Boston]] |publisher=[[Brill Publishers]] on behalf of the International Association for Word and Music Studies |series=Word and Music Studies |volume=20 |pages=285–302 |doi=10.1163/9789004537996_015 |isbn=978-90-04-53799-6 |issn=1875-8134}}</ref><ref>{{cite web | last=Tomlin | first=Edward | title=10 Best Hillsong Worship Songs of All Time | website=Singersroom.com – R&B Music, R&B Videos, R&B News | date=April 10, 2024 | url=https://singersroom.com/w44/best-hillsong-worship-songs-of-all-time/ | access-date=June 3, 2024}}</ref><ref>{{cite web | title=「Third Day」 ３月にライブツアー、スタジオアルバム同時リリース | website=クリスチャントゥデイ | date=May 20, 2002 | url=https://www.christiantoday.co.jp/articles/1956/20080207/news.htm | language=ja | access-date=June 3, 2024}}</ref><ref>{{cite web | last=Llamas | first=Cora | title=Pandemic Streaming Inspires New Filipino Christian Music Label | website=News & Reporting | date=January 1, 1970 | url=https://www.christianitytoday.com/news/2022/march/philippines-sony-christian-music-label-waterwalk-pandemic.html | access-date=June 3, 2024}}</ref>}} It has representation on several music charts, including ''[[Billboard (magazine)|Billboard]]''{{'}}s [[Christian Albums]], [[Christian Songs]], [[Hot Christian AC]] (Adult Contemporary), Christian CHR, Soft AC/Inspirational, and Christian Digital Songs, as well as the UK's [[Official Christian & Gospel Albums Chart]]. Top-selling CCM artists will also appear on the [[Billboard 200|''Billboard'' 200]]. In the [[iTunes Store]], the genre is represented as part of the Christian and gospel genre while the [[Google Play Music]] system labeled it as Christian/Gospel.
